{{CargoRelic
|name=Pritsker Medal
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=Home Value Pack I ($0.99)
|description=Pritsker Medal is known as the Nobel Prize for architecture. About 500 architects are nominated every year, but only one winner is awarded for its outstanding talent, imagination, and responsibility.
|fame=27
|art=17
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=18
|ss1=Relic Stars needed to upgrade Buildings -5%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss2=Relic Stars needed to upgrade Buildings -10%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
|ss3=Relic Stars needed to upgrade Buildings -15%<br>Per 5 Fungus Farm LVLs, Snail ATK +18<br>Fungus Farm LVL: 50/50
}}

[[Category:Value Pack Relics]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Building Upgrade Cost Reduction]]
